name: @uptimizr/godot
description: Godot 4 (Web export) connector for Uptimizr — JS-only pointer/perf capture plus a bridged camera-pose / world-space tier via a thin engine-side shim.
author: Raanan Weber (https://github.com/RaananW)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/godot standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into a Godot 4 Web export's host page. */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-godot.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=UptimizrGodot --platform=browser --target=es2022 --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/godot standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag into a Godot 4 Web export host page; exposes window.UptimizrGodot. */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-godot.global.js
